pricing_plans.name: AI Learning
pricing_plans.tagline: Master 5 AI tools with hands-on modules

faqs.question: What age group is this for?
faqs.answer: DreamerZ is designed for Bengali teenagers aged 12-18, but anyone interested in learning AI tools or improving their conversational English can benefit.

faqs.question: Do I need any prior knowledge?
faqs.answer: No! Both courses start from absolute basics. The AI course starts from "What is AI?" and the English course starts from simple greetings.

faqs.question: Is the payment one-time?
faqs.answer: Yes. You pay once and get lifetime access to all modules, updates, and future content additions. No recurring charges.

faqs.question: Can I access it on my phone?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. DreamerZ works on any device — phone, tablet, or computer. Learn anywhere, anytime.

faqs.question: What if I need help?
faqs.answer: Each module has guided explanations, Bengali tips, and AI-powered practice. You can also reach out to us for support.
